violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Prep cooler on far side near ovens lid is broken and needs repair.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Food found on floor in freezer.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Handle on prep cooler is broken need repair.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Shelving in kitchen needs to be cleaned. - All Equipment needs to be cleaned. - Server line equipment needs to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Hoods need to be deep cleaned.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. - Paper towels missing at the sink by the food line.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors under equipment need to be cleaned. - Wall behind grills, fryers ext need to be cleaned.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
